key_points: Water is an important renewable natural resource
Water is continuously recycled through the hydrological cycle
Agriculture uses the largest share of water resources
Dams store water for irrigation, electricity, and flood control
examples: Bhakra Nangal is a major multipurpose river project in India
Tankas are used in Rajasthan to store rainwater
Rainwater harvesting collects water from rooftops
Bamboo drip irrigation is used in Meghalaya
formulas_or_concepts: Water Scarcity: Shortage of sufficient water resources
Rainwater Harvesting: Collection and storage of rainwater
exam_tips: Remember examples of traditional water harvesting systems
Know at least two multipurpose river projects
Understand the meaning of water scarcity
Learn simple definitions for quick answers
